      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "from scrapers.base import BaseScraper\nfrom utils.helpers import fetch_soup\nfrom dateutil import parser as dateparser\n\nclass TemplateScraper(BaseScraper):\n\n    BASE_URL = \"https://example.com\"\n\n    def get_event_links(self, session, limit=0):\n        urls = []\n        soup = fetch_soup(self.BASE_URL, session)\n\n        # TODO: Update CSS selector\n        for a in soup.select(\"a.event-link\"):\n            href = a.get(\"href\")\n            if not href:\n                continue\n            if href.startswith(\"/\"):\n                href = self.BASE_URL + href\n            urls.append(href)\n\n        return urls[:limit] if limit else urls\n\n    def parse_event(self, url, session):\n        soup = fetch_soup(url, session)\n\n        # TODO: Update these selectors\n        title = soup.select_one(\"h1\").get_text(strip=True)\n        description = soup.select_one(\".description\").get_text(\"\\n\", strip=True)\n        venue = \"\"\n        address = \"\"\n\n        # TODO: Extract real dates\n        start_date = \"\"\n        start_time = \"\"\n        end_date = \"\"\n        end_time = \"\"\n\n        return {\n            \"Event Name\": title,\n            \"Event Description\": description,\n            \"Venue Name\": venue,\n            \"Venue Address\": address,\n            \"Event Start Date\": start_date,\n            \"Event Start Time\": start_time,\n            \"Event End Date\": end_date,\n            \"Event End Time\": end_time,\n            \"All Day Event\": \"FALSE\",\n            \"Event Timezone\": \"America/Halifax\",\n            \"Event Category\": \"\",\n            \"Event Tags\": \"\",\n            \"Event Website\": url,\n            \"Event Cost\": \"\",\n            \"Featured Image\": \"\",\n            \"Show Map\": \"TRUE\",\n            \"Show Map Link\": \"TRUE\",\n        }",

        "originalContents": "from scrapers.base import BaseScraper\nfrom utils.helpers import fetch_soup\nfrom dateutil import parser as dateparser\n\nclass TemplateScraper(BaseScraper):\n\n    BASE_URL = \"https://example.com\"\n\n    def get_event_links(self, session, limit=0):\n        urls = []\n        soup = fetch_soup(self.BASE_URL, session)\n\n        # TODO: Update CSS selector\n        for a in soup.select(\"a.event-link\"):\n            href = a.get(\"href\")\n            if not href:\n                continue\n            if href.startswith(\"/\"):\n                href = self.BASE_URL + href\n            urls.append(href)\n\n        return urls[:limit] if limit else urls\n\n    def parse_event(self, url, session):\n        soup = fetch_soup(url, session)\n\n        # TODO: Update these selectors\n        title = soup.select_one(\"h1\").get_text(strip=True)\n        description = soup.select_one(\".description\").get_text(\"\\n\", strip=True)\n        venue = \"\"\n        address = \"\"\n\n        # TODO: Extract real dates\n        start_date = \"\"\n        start_time = \"\"\n        end_date = \"\"\n        end_time = \"\"\n\n        return {\n            \"Event Name\": title,\n            \"Event Description\": description,\n            \"Venue Name\": venue,\n            \"Venue Address\": address,\n            \"Event Start Date\": start_date,\n            \"Event Start Time\": start_time,\n            \"Event End Date\": end_date,\n            \"Event End Time\": end_time,\n            \"All Day Event\": \"FALSE\",\n            \"Event Timezone\": \"America/Halifax\",\n            \"Event Category\": \"\",\n            \"Event Tags\": \"\",\n            \"Event Website\": url,\n            \"Event Cost\": \"\",\n            \"Featured Image\": \"\",\n            \"Show Map\": \"TRUE\",\n            \"Show Map Link\": \"TRUE\",\n        }",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "import argparse\nimport requests\n\nfrom utils.helpers import write_csv\nfrom scrapers.discoverhalifax import DiscoverHalifaxScraper\nfrom scrapers.jumpcomedy import JumpComedyScraper\n\nSCRAPERS = {\n    \"discoverhalifax\": DiscoverHalifaxScraper(),\n    \"jumpcomedy\": JumpComedyScraper(),\n}\n\ndef main():\n    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description=\"Multi-site event scraper.\")\n    parser.add_argument(\"--site\", required=True, help=\"Site key to scrape\")\n    parser.add_argument(\"--limit\", type=int, default=0, help=\"Limit number of events\")\n    parser.add_argument(\"--output\", default=\"output/events.csv\", help=\"CSV output path\")\n    args = parser.parse_args()\n\n    if args.site not in SCRAPERS:\n        print(f\"Unknown site '{args.site}'. Choose: {', '.join(SCRAPERS.keys())}\")\n        return\n\n    scraper = SCRAPERS[args.site]\n    session = requests.Session()\n\n    print(f\"🔎 Getting event links for {args.site}...\")\n    urls = scraper.get_event_links(session, args.limit)\n\n    print(f\"🔎 Parsing {len(urls)} events...\")\n    events = []\n    for url in urls:\n        try:\n            events.append(scraper.parse_event(url, session))\n        except Exception as e:\n            print(f\"⚠️ Error parsing {url}: {e}\")\n\n    print(\"💾 Saving CSV...\")\n    write_csv(events, args.output)",

        "originalContents": "import argparse\nimport requests\n\nfrom utils.helpers import write_csv\nfrom scrapers.discoverhalifax import DiscoverHalifaxScraper\nfrom scrapers.jumpcomedy import JumpComedyScraper\n\nSCRAPERS = {\n    \"discoverhalifax\": DiscoverHalifaxScraper(),\n    \"jumpcomedy\": JumpComedyScraper(),\n}\n\ndef main():\n    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description=\"Multi-site event scraper.\")\n    parser.add_argument(\"--site\", required=True, help=\"Site key to scrape\")\n    parser.add_argument(\"--limit\", type=int, default=0, help=\"Limit number of events\")\n    parser.add_argument(\"--output\", default=\"output/events.csv\", help=\"CSV output path\")\n    args = parser.parse_args()\n\n    if args.site not in SCRAPERS:\n        print(f\"Unknown site '{args.site}'. Choose: {', '.join(SCRAPERS.keys())}\")\n        return\n\n    scraper = SCRAPERS[args.site]\n    session = requests.Session()\n\n    print(f\"🔎 Getting event links for {args.site}...\")\n    urls = scraper.get_event_links(session, args.limit)\n\n    print(f\"🔎 Parsing {len(urls)} events...\")\n    events = []\n    for url in urls:\n        try:\n            events.append(scraper.parse_event(url, session))\n        except Exception as e:\n            print(f\"⚠️ Error parsing {url}: {e}\")\n\n    print(\"💾 Saving CSV...\")\n    write_csv(events, args.output)",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "from scrapers.base import BaseScraper\nfrom utils.helpers import fetch_soup\n\nclass JumpComedyScraper(BaseScraper):\n\n    BASE_URL = \"https://www.jumpcomedy.com/events\"\n\n    def get_event_links(self, session, limit=0):\n        soup = fetch_soup(self.BASE_URL, session)\n        links = []\n\n        # TODO — update CSS selectors\n        for a in soup.select(\"a[href*='/e/']\"):\n            href = a.get(\"href\")\n            if href.startswith(\"/\"):\n                href = \"https://www.jumpcomedy.com\" + href\n            links.append(href)\n\n        return links[:limit] if limit else links\n\n    def parse_event(self, url, session):\n        soup = fetch_soup(url, session)\n\n        # TODO — update selectors with real structure\n        title = soup.select_one(\"h1\").get_text(strip=True)\n\n        return {\n            \"Event Name\": title,\n            \"Event Description\": \"\",\n            \"Venue Name\": \"\",\n            \"Venue Address\": \"\",\n            \"Event Start Date\": \"\",\n            \"Event Start Time\": \"\",\n            \"Event End Date\": \"\",\n            \"Event End Time\": \"\",\n            \"All Day Event\": \"FALSE\",\n            \"Event Timezone\": \"America/Halifax\",\n            \"Event Category\": \"\",\n            \"Event Tags\": \"\",\n            \"Event Website\": url,\n            \"Event Cost\": \"\",\n            \"Featured Image\": \"\",\n            \"Show Map\": \"TRUE\",\n            \"Show Map Link\": \"TRUE\",\n        }",

        "originalContents": "from scrapers.base import BaseScraper\nfrom utils.helpers import fetch_soup\n\nclass JumpComedyScraper(BaseScraper):\n\n    BASE_URL = \"https://www.jumpcomedy.com/events\"\n\n    def get_event_links(self, session, limit=0):\n        soup = fetch_soup(self.BASE_URL, session)\n        links = []\n\n        # TODO — update CSS selectors\n        for a in soup.select(\"a[href*='/e/']\"):\n            href = a.get(\"href\")\n            if href.startswith(\"/\"):\n                href = \"https://www.jumpcomedy.com\" + href\n            links.append(href)\n\n        return links[:limit] if limit else links\n\n    def parse_event(self, url, session):\n        soup = fetch_soup(url, session)\n\n        # TODO — update selectors with real structure\n        title = soup.select_one(\"h1\").get_text(strip=True)\n\n        return {\n            \"Event Name\": title,\n            \"Event Description\": \"\",\n            \"Venue Name\": \"\",\n            \"Venue Address\": \"\",\n            \"Event Start Date\": \"\",\n            \"Event Start Time\": \"\",\n            \"Event End Date\": \"\",\n            \"Event End Time\": \"\",\n            \"All Day Event\": \"FALSE\",\n            \"Event Timezone\": \"America/Halifax\",\n            \"Event Category\": \"\",\n            \"Event Tags\": \"\",\n            \"Event Website\": url,\n            \"Event Cost\": \"\",\n            \"Featured Image\": \"\",\n            \"Show Map\": \"TRUE\",\n            \"Show Map Link\": \"TRUE\",\n        }",
        "range": {

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "from scrapers.base import BaseScraper\nfrom utils.helpers import fetch_soup\n\nclass DiscoverHalifaxScraper(BaseScraper):\n\n    BASE_URL = \"https://discoverhalifaxns.com/events/\"\n\n    def get_event_links(self, session, limit=0):\n        soup = fetch_soup(self.BASE_URL, session)\n        links = []\n\n        # TODO — paste your real DH link scraping code here\n        for a in soup.select(\"a[href*='/event/']\"):\n            href = a.get(\"href\")\n            if not href:\n                continue\n            if href.startswith(\"/\"):\n                href = \"https://discoverhalifaxns.com\" + href\n            links.append(href)\n\n        return links[:limit] if limit else links\n\n    def parse_event(self, url, session):\n        soup = fetch_soup(url, session)\n\n        # TODO — paste your real parsing logic here\n\n        title_el = soup.find(\"h1\")\n        title = title_el.get_text(strip=True) if title_el else \"Untitled\"\n\n        description_el = soup.find(\"div\", class_=\"entry-content\")\n        description = description_el.get_text(\"\\n\", strip=True) if description_el else \"\"\n\n        return {\n            \"Event Name\": title,\n            \"Event Description\": description,\n            \"Venue Name\": \"\",\n            \"Venue Address\": \"\",\n            \"Event Start Date\": \"\",\n            \"Event Start Time\": \"\",\n            \"Event End Date\": \"\",\n            \"Event End Time\": \"\",\n            \"All Day Event\": \"FALSE\",\n            \"Event Timezone\": \"America/Halifax\",\n            \"Event Category\": \"\",\n            \"Event Tags\": \"\",\n            \"Event Website\": url,\n            \"Event Cost\": \"\",\n            \"Featured Image\": \"\",\n            \"Show Map\": \"TRUE\",\n            \"Show Map Link\": \"TRUE\",\n        }",

        "originalContents": "from scrapers.base import BaseScraper\nfrom utils.helpers import fetch_soup\n\nclass DiscoverHalifaxScraper(BaseScraper):\n\n    BASE_URL = \"https://discoverhalifaxns.com/events/\"\n\n    def get_event_links(self, session, limit=0):\n        soup = fetch_soup(self.BASE_URL, session)\n        links = []\n\n        # TODO — paste your real DH link scraping code here\n        for a in soup.select(\"a[href*='/event/']\"):\n            href = a.get(\"href\")\n            if not href:\n                continue\n            if href.startswith(\"/\"):\n                href = \"https://discoverhalifaxns.com\" + href\n            links.append(href)\n\n        return links[:limit] if limit else links\n\n    def parse_event(self, url, session):\n        soup = fetch_soup(url, session)\n\n        # TODO — paste your real parsing logic here\n\n        title_el = soup.find(\"h1\")\n        title = title_el.get_text(strip=True) if title_el else \"Untitled\"\n\n        description_el = soup.find(\"div\", class_=\"entry-content\")\n        description = description_el.get_text(\"\\n\", strip=True) if description_el else \"\"\n\n        return {\n            \"Event Name\": title,\n            \"Event Description\": description,\n            \"Venue Name\": \"\",\n            \"Venue Address\": \"\",\n            \"Event Start Date\": \"\",\n            \"Event Start Time\": \"\",\n            \"Event End Date\": \"\",\n            \"Event End Time\": \"\",\n            \"All Day Event\": \"FALSE\",\n            \"Event Timezone\": \"America/Halifax\",\n            \"Event Category\": \"\",\n            \"Event Tags\": \"\",\n            \"Event Website\": url,\n            \"Event Cost\": \"\",\n            \"Featured Image\": \"\",\n            \"Show Map\": \"TRUE\",\n            \"Show Map Link\": \"TRUE\",\n        }",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "import csv\nimport requests\nfrom bs4 import BeautifulSoup\n\nCSV_COLUMNS = [\n    \"Event Name\",\n    \"Event Description\",\n    \"Venue Name\",\n    \"Venue Address\",\n    \"Event Start Date\",\n    \"Event Start Time\",\n    \"Event End Date\",\n    \"Event End Time\",\n    \"All Day Event\",\n    \"Event Timezone\",\n    \"Event Category\",\n    \"Event Tags\",\n    \"Event Website\",\n    \"Event Cost\",\n    \"Featured Image\",\n    \"Show Map\",\n    \"Show Map Link\",\n]\n\ndef fetch_soup(url, session):\n    print(f\"Fetching: {url}\")\n    resp = session.get(url, timeout=20)\n    resp.raise_for_status()\n    return BeautifulSoup(resp.text, \"html.parser\")",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\n\ndef write_csv(events, output_path):\n    from utils.helpers import CSV_COLUMNS\n\n    with open(output_path, \"w\", newline=\"\", encoding=\"utf-8\") as f:\n        writer = csv.DictWriter(f, fieldnames=CSV_COLUMNS)\n        writer.writeheader()\n        for event in events:\n            writer.writerow(event)\n    print(f\"✅ CSV saved → {output_path}\")",
